heading: Funding
label: 3871d Funding
notes: Amendments2025—Subsec. (a). added subsec. (a) and struck out former subsec. (a). children.heading: Duration of availability
children.label: b Duration of availability
children.text: Funds made available under subsection (a) shall remain available until expended.

50 percent of the funds to projects based on a State or multistate competitive process administered by the Secretary at the local level with the advice of the applicable State technical committees established under subchapter VI; and
50 percent of the funds to projects for critical conservation areas designated under .section 3871f of this title

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Except as provided in paragraph (2), none of the funds made available for the program, including for a partnership agreement funded through an alternative funding arrangement or grant agreement under , may be used to pay for the administrative expenses of eligible partners.section 3871c(d) of this title

children.label: A
children.text: providing outreach and education to producers for potential participation in the project;

children.label: B
children.text: establishing baseline metrics to support the development of the assessment required under ; orsection 3871b(c)(1)(E) of this title

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: At the time of project selection, the Secretary shall identify and make publicly available the amount that the Secretary shall use to provide technical assistance under the terms of the partnership agreement.

children.heading: Limitation
children.label: 2 Limitation
children.text: The Secretary shall limit costs of the Secretary for technical assistance to costs specific and necessary to carry out the objectives of the program.

children.heading: Third-party providers
children.label: 3 Third-party providers
children.text: The Secretary shall develop and implement strategies to encourage third-party technical service providers to provide technical assistance to eligible partners pursuant to a partnership agreement.
